phrases.intent_en: Ask where the monarchs' tombs are located
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde se encuentran las tumbas de los Reyes?
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, DOH-deh se en-kwen-TRAN las TOOM-bas de los REH-yes?

likely_response.local: Detrás de la reja dorada, en el presbiterio.
likely_response.pronunciation: DEHTRÁS DEH LAH REH-hah doh-RAH-dah EHN EHL preh-sbee-teh-REE-oh
likely_response.translation_en: In the presbytery, behind the grille.

responses.english: In the presbytery, behind the grille.
responses.phonetic: DEHTRÁS DEH LAH REH-hah doh-RAH-dah EHN EHL preh-sbee-teh-REE-oh
responses.french: Detrás de la reja dorada, en el presbiterio.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the royal artifacts museum is
phrases.text_local: ¿Podría decirme dónde está el museo de la Capilla?
phrases.pronunciation: ¿Poh-DREE-ah deh-SEER-meh DOHN-deh eh-STAH el moo-SEH-oh deh lah kah-PEE-yah?

likely_response.local: En la sacristía, al fondo a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: EHN LAH sahth-ree-STÍ-ah AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: In the sacristy, at the back left.

responses.english: In the sacristy, at the back left.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH sahth-ree-STÍ-ah AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.french: En la sacristía, al fondo a la izquierda.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to find the Granada Cathedral entrance
phrases.text_local: ¿Cómo llego a la entrada de la Catedral?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moh YEH-goh ah lah en-TRAH-dah deh lah kah-teh-DRAHL?

likely_response.local: Salga, cruce la plaza, frente a Capilla Real.
likely_response.pronunciation: SAHL-gah KROO-theh LAH PLAH-thah FREHN-teh AH kah-PEEL-lah reh-AHL
likely_response.translation_en: Exit and turn immediately to the right.

responses.english: Exit and turn immediately to the right.
responses.phonetic: SAHL-gah KROO-theh LAH PLAH-thah FREHN-teh AH kah-PEEL-lah reh-AHL
responses.french: Salga, cruce la plaza, frente a Capilla Real.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket counter is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la taquilla de entradas?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, ¿DOHN-deh eh-STAH lah tah-KEE-yah deh en-TRAH-dahs?

likely_response.local: Junto al arco de la Puerta de las
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AHL AHR-koh DEH LAH poo-EHR-tah DEH LAHS
likely_response.translation_en: To the right of the main entrance.

responses.english: To the right of the main entrance.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AHL AHR-koh DEH LAH poo-EHR-tah DEH LAHS
responses.french: Junto al arco de la Puerta de las
